Keynote Topics

Real tools for the real world.

Every program is built for your audience — leaders, teams, or whole organizations — with measurable outcomes, not just inspiration. Fully customizable to your event.

01
For All Audiences

Mental Fitness: The Resilience Reset

Science-grounded tools to break patterns of negative thinking, manage stress, and build the mental fitness that high performance requires.

Planner outcome: Audience leaves with a personal resilience framework they can use the next morning.
02
For Leadership Teams

Leading Through Adversity

How leaders model resilience under pressure — and how that behavior cascades through culture to drive or destroy team performance.

Planner outcome: Leaders leave with concrete behaviors to model resilience from the top down.
03
For Organizations in Change

Change Without Chaos

Practical strategies for navigating organizational change without losing your best people, damaging trust, or destroying momentum.

Planner outcome: Teams understand the neuroscience of change and leave better equipped for it.
04
For Healthcare & High-Demand Teams

Burnout-Proof: Sustaining Performance Under Pressure

Evidence-based practices to maintain wellbeing and performance even in chronically stressful, high-stakes environments.

Planner outcome: A practical toolkit that works in high-demand industries — not generic wellness advice.
For event planners

What your audience takes home that matters

Anne's programs aren't motivational speeches with a 48-hour shelf life. They're built around neuroscience and behavioral change — so the tools stick after the applause ends.

  • A personal resilience framework usable the next morning
  • Neuroscience-backed strategies for managing stress under pressure
  • Tools for leading through uncertainty without burning out
  • A shared language teams use to support each other
  • Measurable mindset shifts — trackable via post-event assessments

About Anne Grady

Not a speaker who happens to know about resilience.

Anne Grady has lived this material. After years of navigating extraordinary personal and professional adversity — including raising a son with a severe mental illness — she turned her experience into a science-backed, practical system field-tested in boardrooms and leadership retreats across every major industry.

She's a bestselling author of three books, a two-time TEDx speaker, and has been featured on NBC, CBS, and in dozens of major business publications. Her clients include Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, healthcare systems, and nonprofit leaders.
